release_safe_definition: GitHub-safe repository snapshot. Includes public contracts, scripts, docs, Layer 1 skeletons, workflows, public exports, release notes, and public variable cards. Excludes restricted raw data, local parquet copies, and patient-level Layer 2-5 outputs.

release_governance.versioning_rule: Use semantic-version style release_version strings, with -dev or other suffixes allowed for non-stable lines.
release_governance.release_update_rule: Whenever the public release boundary changes, update release_safe_manifest.json, PUBLIC_INVENTORY.md, RELEASE_CHANGELOG.md, the current generated public exports under docs/public_exports/, and the current release note under docs/releases/ in the same change set.
release_governance.release_notes_rule: Each release tag should have one matching public release note under docs/releases/ that summarizes scope, coverage, and related generated exports.
release_governance.release_gate_rule: A release-ready snapshot should pass scripts/check_public_repository.py and have a matching changelog heading before a stable tag or release note is published.

database_statuses.public_layer4_support_status: public MIMIC source-package boundary contract published; local Layer 4 opening registry built pending owner review
database_statuses.public_layer5_public_status: broad reviewed-approved local assets exist and public std-variable cards are published

database_statuses.public_layer4_support_status: local Layer 4 opening registry built pending owner review; ECHO-specific public opening policy not yet published
database_statuses.public_layer5_public_status: database-level local notes exist, but no reviewed-approved retained-variable family has been published yet

database_statuses.public_layer4_support_status: database opening policy registry contract and validator path are published
database_statuses.public_layer5_public_status: pilot reviewed-approved local assets exist and public std-variable cards are published for shared variables

database_statuses.public_layer4_support_status: local Layer 4 opening registry built pending owner review; public opening policy not yet published
database_statuses.public_layer5_public_status: no reviewed-approved SICdb retained-variable assets yet

database_statuses.public_layer4_support_status: local Layer 4 opening registry built pending owner review; public opening policy not yet published
database_statuses.public_layer5_public_status: no reviewed-approved NWICU retained-variable assets yet

database_statuses.public_layer4_support_status: local Layer 4 opening registry built pending owner review; public opening policy not yet published
